title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at United India Insurance Capital India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at United India Insurance Capital India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with United India Insurance Capital India! We are hiring a Risk Analyst for our Jaipur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About United India Insurance Capital India:
United India Insurance Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with United India Insurance Capital India!
